general.name: Renew
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>8BCEE6E0-0C9E-440E-A74A-08CBA87CA4E6</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>8BCEE6E0-0C9E-440E-A74A-08CBA87CA4E6</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Renew</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Custom Settings</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>3EA92CC0-5B06-4E3F-9EBE-43726B941AA7</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ManagedClient.preferences</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>3EA92CC0-5B06-4E3F-9EBE-43726B941AA7</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadContent</key><dict><key>com.secondsonconsulting.renew</key><dict><key>Forced</key><array><dict><key>mcx_preference_settings</key><dict><key>OptionalArguments</key><dict><key>AdditionalAggressiveOptions</key><string/><key>AdditionalDialogOptions</key><string/><key>AdditionalNormalOptions</key><string/><key>AdditionalNotificationOptions</key><string/><key>AggroMessage</key><string>In order to keep your system healthy and secure it needs to be restarted.  Please **save your work** and restart as soon as possible.</string><key>BannerImage</key><string/><key>BannerImageDarkMode</key><string/><key>Deadline</key><integer>50</integer><key>DeferralButtonText</key><string>Defer (24 hours)</string><key>MessageIcon</key><string>/Users/Shared/sakslogo.jpg</string><key>MessageIconDarkMode</key><string>/Users/Shared/sakslogo.jpg</string><key>NoDeferralsRemainingButtonText</key><string>No Deferrals Remaining</string><key>NotificationIcon</key><string>/Users/Shared/sakslogo.jpg</string><key>NotificationIconDarkMode</key><string>/Users/Shared/sakslogo.jpg</string><key>NotificationMessage</key><string>In order to keep your system healthy and secure it needs to be restarted.  Please save your work and restart as soon as possible.</string><key>NotificationSubtitle</key><string/><key>RestartButtonText</key><string>Restart Now</string><key>SecretQuitKey</key><string>K</string><key>ShowDeferralCount</key><true/><key>Title</key><string>Please Restart</string></dict><key>RequiredArguments</key><dict><key>DeferralDuration</key><integer>24</integer><key>MaximumDeferrals</key><integer>30</integer><key>NotificationThreshold</key><integer>7</integer><key>UptimeThreshold</key><integer>0</integer></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>
